value.found_quote: Administrators can prevent this mode by setting `permissions.disableBypassPermissionsMode` to `"disable"` in [managed settings](#managed-settings).... To prevent `bypassPermissions` or `auto` mode from being used, set `permissions.disableBypassPermissionsMode` or `permissions.disableAutoMode` to `"disable"` in any [settings file](/en/settings#settings-files). These are most useful in [managed settings](#managed-settings) where they cannot be overridden.
value.name: Managed Settings
